title: Diamondback Energy: Oil Producers To Benefit From Substantial Decline In Crude Reserve

title: Diamondback Energy: No Snake Eyes Here

title: 7 Large-Cap Stocks Trading at a Discount Right Now
text: One of the financial metrics I use to find large-cap stocks trading at a discount is their free cash flow yield.  Free cash flow (or FCF) is the remaining cash flow from operations after subtracting a company's capital expenditures.

title: Diamondback Energy, Inc. Schedules Second Quarter 2022 Conference Call for August 2, 2022
text: MIDLAND, Texas, July 01, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) (“Diamondback”), today announced that it plans to release second quarter 2022 financial results on August 1, 2022 after the market closes.
